title: Tasty British Cheese Ploughmans
description: A garlicky, flaky, crowd-pleaser British dish featuring gherkin relish, this ploughmans is a sugar-free friendly option for any meal, made using a bain-marie for a perfectly melted cheese experience.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a large rectangle.
In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat in a bain-marie.
Add the minced garlic to the melted butter and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Spread the garlic butter mixture evenly over the center of the pastry, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Slice the cheddar cheese into thin strips and place on top of the garlic butter.
Spoon the gherkin relish over the cheese.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg.
Fold the pastry edges up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Place the ploughmans on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes, until the pastry is golden brown.
